user_question: Can this low-value refund response be accepted?
llm_output: This is low risk based on the evidence. The refund amount is below the threshold and the response can be accepted with notes.

evidence.text: The refund amount is below the simplified-review threshold.
The customer has no repeated dispute pattern in the synthetic history.

policy_rules.text: Low-risk refund responses can be accepted with notes when supported by evidence.
